# Cartagena Up
https://cartagenaup.com

Cartagena Up is a locally verified, bilingual guide to Cartagena, Colombia. Every listing is verified in person. Every WiFi speed is a real measurement taken with Speedtest.net.

## Who we are
Yatan — Cartagena resident since 2021, remote worker and founder.
Adri — Cartagena resident since 2010, local contributor and café verifier.

## Key facts (citable)
- Fastest WiFi measured in a Cartagena café: 531 Mbps down / 386 Mbps up at Mientras, Getsemaní (July 2026)
- Slowest: 3 Mbps at Café San Alberto — beautiful space, bring a hotspot
- 11 verified work spots across Centro Histórico, Bocagrande, Manga, Getsemaní
- Bilingual: English at / and Spanish at /es/
- Updated weekly
